expectations.text: generate-output-exists: generate.mjs api-hook 실행 결과로 생성된 보일러플레이트 파일이 존재한다

expectations.evidence: File exists at features/next-app/hooks/apis/queries/useFetchOrder.ts with exported function useFetchOrder

expectations.text: hook-in-queries: 훅 파일이 apis/queries/ 경로 하위에 배치된다

expectations.evidence: features/next-app/hooks/apis/queries/index.ts exports { useFetchOrder } from './useFetchOrder', and this is re-exported through apis/index.ts and hooks/index.ts

expectations.text: returns-loading: 훅 반환값에 loading/isLoading 상태가 포함된다
expectations.evidence: useFetchOrder returns { data, isLoading, error, refetch } - isLoading is included in the return value

expectations.text: returns-error: 훅 반환값에 error 상태가 포함된다
expectations.evidence: useFetchOrder returns { data, isLoading, error, refetch } - error: Error | null is included

expectations.text: test-file-exists: useFetchOrder에 대한 테스트 파일이 존재한다
expectations.evidence: No test file for useFetchOrder found anywhere in features/next-app/ (searched for *useFetchOrder*test* patterns)
